<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Mime\HtmlToTextConverter; /** * @author Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> */ interface HtmlToTextConverterInterface { /** * Converts an HTML representation of a Message to a text representation. * * The output must use the same charset as the HTML one. */ public function convert(string $html, string $charset): string; }
